text:
Last winter there was an unusual visitor to Meadowvale. Polly went out walking. An odd-looking creature sat by her.

It was about the size of a cat. Its fur wasn't brown fur; it had a fluffy white mane. It stood on two slender legs. Its large eyes seemed thoughtful. Polly spoke up.

"Oh! You're lost?"

The creature blinked. "Something like.”

They exchanged looks. Maybe it wanted food? She reached out. Her hand trembled. She withdrew it quickly. "Something else."

Its gaze stayed thoughtful.

"You want company?" Polly ventured.

You could say that.

The creature sniffed the air. That was curious. It walked a bit closer. Then it sniffed her. Just a bit.

"Polly?"

That.

Maybe it wanted names?

She nodded slowly. "Hugo."

The creature tilted its head.

Polly laughed. "Right."

Hours passed. You could have heard an owl. Then the creature stood.

"Daisy?"

You could
